text.p: I I write to complain of the poor state of road in your our local Govern-ment area.
I went to these medium to 1 word express my congratulation for you becoming the Chairman of local government ar-ea, state.

As stated ealier, write to ask for construction of new road that will link from to local government area to reduce tran-sportation problem of people. is one of the largest state. It has as population of about 1,700 people. The service rendered by the government despensary constructed by the colonial masters in 1974, which is the only road to local gover-nment are which has grossly spoiled. Old men and women Children and Adult travel long distence to save their lives and others in fact in the state which inadequate means of transportation complicated matters for some of the bussiness men.

Therefore, the only way to solve this particular problem is to construct new road to local government area. The "Better way for all campagns" of Your Chairm-anship may create oppotunities for the construction of new road to the state.
I should be very grateful if you could approve the construction of road to local government area this year when you begin to implement the expensive progr-ame of the Chairmanship.
